name: gradual-manual
description: Pipeline-managed Cloudflare Worker generated by `devpad pipelines init`

scripts.build: bun build src/index.ts --outdir dist --target browser --external cloudflare:*
scripts.test: find src -name '*.test.ts' -o -name '*.spec.ts' | grep -q . && bun test --concurrency 1 src || echo 'no unit tests'
